description_long: This object is a stylized human figure, depicted standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, with boots and a cap, and is wearing dark sunglasses. The skin tone and clothing are rendered in a yellowish hue, with some darker shading around the neck and face. The figure's proportions are cartoonish, with exaggerated hands and feet. The overall appearance is simple, with minimal surface detail and a smooth finish.
description: A stylized human figure in a T-pose, wearing a cap, sunglasses, shirt, shorts, and boots, rendered in yellow tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with sunglasses, cap, shirt, shorts, and boots, arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, nose, and boots, with arms and hands visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cap, shirt, shorts, and boots, with arms extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, cap, and boots.
attribute_hull_design: No hull is visible; the object is a humanoid figure with no nautical features.
attribute_deck_layout: No deck layout is present; the object is a standing human figure with no yacht features.
attribute_cabin_structure: No cabin structure is visible; the object is a humanoid figure with no enclosed spaces.
